zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance DE FOIX於1276年出生在法國阿利艾福瓦時，她的父親Roger Bernard III De Foix33歲，母親Marguerite De Bearn31歲。她於1296年3月1日與Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix在法國奧德卡爾卡頌結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1332年12月7日在法國阿利艾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance DE FOIX于1276年出生在法国阿利艾福瓦时，她的父亲Roger Bernard III De Foix33岁，母亲Marguerite De Bearn31岁。她于1296年3月1日与Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix在法国奧德卡爾卡頌结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1332年12月7日在法国阿利艾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: FOIX
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss French: unexplained. In Switzerland it is found mainly in the Valais Canton.
Catalan: nickname from moix with various possible meanings, including ‘cat’, ‘drunk’, and ‘lame’.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance DE FOIX was born in 1276, in Foix, Ariège, France, her father, Roger Bernard III De Foix, was 33 and her mother, Marguerite De Bearn, was 31. She married Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix on 1 March 1296, in Carcassonne, Aude, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 December 1332, in Ariège, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance DE FOIX est née en 1276, à Foix, Ariège, France, son père, Roger Bernard III De Foix, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Marguerite De Bearn, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix le 1 mars 1296, à Carcassonne, Aude, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1332, à Ariège, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance DE FOIX 1276 in Foix, Ariège, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bernard III De Foix 33 und ihre Mutter Marguerite De Bearn 31. Sie hat am 1. März 1296 in Carcassonne, Aude, Frankreich Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1332 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Ariège, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance DE FOIX è nata il nel 1276 nel Foix, Ariège, Francia, sua padre, Roger Bernard III De Foix, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Marguerite De Bearn, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix il 1 marzo 1296, nel Carcassonne, Aude, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1332, nel Ariège, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance DE FOIXが1276年にフランスアリeッジフォイックスで生まれた時，父Roger Bernard III De Foixは33歳，母Marguerite De Bearnは31歳であった。1296年3月1日にフランスアウドカーカソンでJean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1332年12月7日にフランスアリeッジで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance DE FOIX(이)가 1276년 프랑스 애리e지 포이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bernard III De Foix(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite De Bearn(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1296년 3월 1일 프랑스 오드 카르캐손에서 Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 12월 7일 프랑스 애리e지에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance DE FOIX nasceu em 1276, em Foix, Ariège, França, seu pai, Roger Bernard III De Foix, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite De Bearn, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix em 1 de março de 1296, em Carcassonne, Aude, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1332, em Ariège, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance DE FOIX родилась в 1276 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, Франция, её отцу по имени Roger Bernard III De Foix было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite De Bearn, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix 1 марта 1296 г. в местности каркассонн, ауд, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 декабря 1332 г. в местности ариeдж, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance DE FOIX nació en 1276, en Foix, Ariège, Francia, su papá, Roger Bernard III De Foix, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Marguerite De Bearn, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Jean Ier de Lévis-Mirepoix el 1 de marzo de 1296, en Carcassonne, Aude, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1332, en Ariège, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
